# Vendored Runtime Libraries

Place permissively licensed vendored runtime libraries here:

- `distribution/vendor/<name>/...`

Requirements:

- Allowed licenses: MIT, Apache-2.0, ISC
- Include upstream `LICENSE` or `LICENSE.txt` in each library folder
- Document each vendored component in `distribution/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`
- Do not use CDN URLs; reference local relative paths only
